title: For science!
description: Adds the entire Periodic table and scientifically accurate ways to obtain these elements.
body:
Dive into the atomic world with For Science!, a revolutionary Minecraft mod that brings the wonders of the Periodic Table to life in ways you've never imagined.

Build the Periodic Table Discovery Hub, a central hub for your scientific endeavors. Access detailed information about each element, track your progress in mastering the Elemental Realms, and showcase your most significant discoveries to fellow Minecraft scientists.

Establish your own alchemy Lab to conduct groundbreaking research on the properties of each element. Uncover hidden recipes, and use your newfound knowledge to create powerful potions that grant you extraordinary abilities.
More elements added in future updates!
